top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz May Open Within a Month if Framework Deal Holds
top_signals.summary: Tehran would restore shipping through the Strait of Hormuz to pre-war levels within a month in a framework deal with the U.S. to also include withdrawing U.S. forces from Iran's vicinity, Iranian state television reported on Wednesday.The report said the U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: European stocks to open lower as traders assess chances of Iran peace deal
top_signals.summary: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Thursday as investors assess the prospects of a peace deal to end the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US charges Google employee with insider trading bets on Polymarket
top_signals.summary: The Justice Department and the CFTC allege that Google software engineer Michele Spagnuolo profited $1.2 million on Polymarket after accessing non-public information at work.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 'King of Cashmere' CEO on outperforming the luxury slowdown: Don't be greedy
top_signals.summary: Brunello Cucinelli's success is tied to its ethos of choosing long-term integrity over short-term margin chasing, CEO Riccardo Stefanelli told CNBC.
